overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character with red hair and a purple outfit walking through a bright, modern city district. The character navigates sidewalks, passes by NPCs and futuristic vehicles, and climbs a grand staircase in a bustling urban plaza with glass skyscrapers and digital billboards.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow concrete corridor following a man in a red shirt. At around 2 seconds, the character emerges into a bright open area with yellow chevron road markings and traffic bollards, revealing a modern glass skyscraper in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an urban sidewalk with a concrete wall on the left featuring green 'Tyger Claws' graffiti. The character passes by NPCs sitting on wide concrete steps and a red fire hydrant, with a metal guardrail separating the walkway from the street where sparse traffic moves.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide plaza approach with a grand concrete staircase ahead. Digital billboards and advertisements cover the building facades. The character walks toward the stairs, passing planter boxes with greenery, while a futuristic green sports car drives by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper plaza level with monumental stairs and elevated walkways

events.description: character reaches top of stairs and turns to descend
character completes descent and begins walking along lower plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand stairs, walking across the upper plaza level, descending the stairs, and navigating the lower plaza area

notable_agents.action: man in gray suit with red scarf descending the stairs

entered.detail: elevated concrete platform with glass railings overlooking the street below
illuminated signs and digital displays on upper building levels

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase to an upper plaza deck with glass railings and neon signage. After reaching the top, the character turns and descends the stairs, passing other pedestrians, then continues walking along the lower plaza area with the massive staircase structure remaining prominent in the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined concrete corridor into a sprawling, futuristic urban plaza. It begins by following a man in a red shirt through a narrow passage before emerging into a bright open area marked by yellow chevron road markings and a distant glass skyscraper. As the camera moves along an urban sidewalk, it passes green Tyger Claws graffiti and pedestrians resting on concrete steps, separated from the street traffic by a metal guardrail. The scene then expands into a wide plaza approach where the character walks past greenery and a passing green sports car toward a grand concrete staircase flanked by digital billboards. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs to an upper deck with neon signage and glass railings before descending back through the crowd to navigate the lower plaza area.
